code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let target = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(body)
  mut i = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut tok = ""
  mut in_tok = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(body, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if in_tok
        if tok == target
          count = count + 1
        end
        tok = ""
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      in_tok = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_tok
    if tok == target
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
end
